Monitor subprocessor changes and retention exceptions quarterly.
Confirm accountable human owner before operational approval.
Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and support-region confirmation.

agents.name: Intake Agent
agents.role: Extracts case facts, missing facts, and delegates evidence needs.

agents.name: Evidence Retrieval Agent
agents.role: Searches supplied and local evidence signals, retries weak coverage, and reports sufficiency.

agents.name: Privacy Specialist
agents.role: Reviews DPA, subprocessors, retention, transfer, data categories, and model-training exclusions.

agents.name: Security Specialist
agents.role: Reviews SOC 2, ISO, access control, encryption, logging, BCP, and technical assurance evidence.

agents.name: Responsible AI Specialist
agents.role: Challenges AI use, model training, automation, oversight, and transparency risk.

agents.name: Learning & Precedent Specialist
agents.role: Looks up deterministic synthetic precedent patterns as advisory memory.

agents.name: Compass Advisory Critic
agents.role: Runs live Compass advisory review when configured; never owns the final decision.

agents.name: Final Advisory Reviewer
agents.role: Optional live CrewAI advisory reviewer when AGENT_RUNTIME=crewai_live; advisory only.

agents.name: Deterministic Decision Owner
agents.role: Applies deterministic policy and remains final decision authority.

agents.name: Audit Packager
agents.role: Packages the decision, evidence, collaboration trace, and review artifacts.

gaps.action: Assign the accountable business unit or requester before approval.
Confirm the operating geography and regulatory perimeter.
Upload or reference policy, contract, questionnaire, or assurance evidence.
gaps.gap: No usable supporting evidence or document content was provided.

gaps.action: Require model-training exclusion or approved data-use terms before approval.
gaps.gap: AI/model governance is applicable but training-data handling is unclear.

gaps.action: Require DPA, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and transfer evidence.
gaps.gap: Privacy/data governance is applicable but DPA evidence was not detected.

gaps.action: Ask the domain owner whether business continuity obligations apply.
Obtain the final export classification or ECCN with accountable trade-compliance confirmation.
gaps.gap: Final export classification evidence remains unresolved.

gaps.action: Complete sanctions, denied-party, and destination screening before approval.
gaps.gap: Sanctions and restricted-party screening remain unresolved.

control_suggestions: Require signed model-training exclusion for patient or customer data before production.
Confirm DPA amendment covers analytics support, subprocessors, retention, deletion, and cross-border review.
Add reviewer question: Has any analytics data been used for model improvement or service training?
Keep annual SOC 2 and ISO evidence refresh on reviewer calendar.
Monitor subprocessor changes and retention exceptions quarterly.
Confirm accountable human owner before operational approval.
Require retention schedule and deletion assistance evidence.
Require cross-border transfer mechanism and support-region confirmation.
learning_memory.note: Learning memory is advisory. Deterministic policy and current evidence remain authoritative.
